title: rosa viscaria var. dolichocarpa
intro: Rosa viscaria var. dolichocarpa, also known as the Alpine Sweet Briar or Mountain Sweet Briar, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, including flavonoids, phenolic acids, and essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa viscaria var. dolichocarpa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
